study.title: Image Generation Diversity Study
study.description: Help us evaluate the diversity of AI-generated images. Your responses will contribute to research on improving image generation models.
study.instructions: For each prompt, you will see two sets of images generated by different models. Compare the sets and rate them on each metric. There are no right or wrong answers — we want your honest impression.

prompts.text: A cat sitting on a windowsill

metrics.label: Image Quality
metrics.question: Which set has higher visual quality?

metrics.label: Prompt Alignment
metrics.question: Which set better matches the prompt?
